'''nadhongo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nocodazole|nocodazole]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-dh-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nocodazole|nocodazole]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| nadhongo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:nædhengeth|nædhengeth]] || [[word:nædhengej|nædhengej]] || [[word:nædhengesh|nædhengesh]] || [[word:nædhenge|nædhenge]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:nadhodhongoth|nadhodhongoth]] || [[word:nadhodhongoj|nadhodhongoj]] || [[word:nadhodhongosh|nadhodhongosh]] || [[word:nadhodhongo|nadhodhongo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:nadhongoth|nadhongoth]] || [[word:nadhongoj|nadhongoj]] || [[word:nadhongosh|nadhongosh]] || [[word:nadhongo|nadhongo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:nadhofngoth|nadhofngoth]] || [[word:nadhofngoj|nadhofngoj]] || [[word:nadhofngosh|nadhofngosh]] || [[word:nadhofngof|nadhofngof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:nadhongotho|nadhongotho]] || [[word:nadhongojo|nadhongojo]] || [[word:nadhongosho|nadhongosho]] || [[word:nadhongoko|nadhongoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:nadhongoth|nadhongoth]] || [[word:nadhongoj|nadhongoj]] || [[word:nadhongosh|nadhongosh]] || [[word:nadhongo|nadhongo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:nadhongothol|nadhongothol]] || [[word:nadhongojol|nadhongojol]] || [[word:nadhongoshol|nadhongoshol]] || [[word:nadhongokol|nadhongokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:nadhongothotho|nadhongothotho]] || [[word:nadhongojojo|nadhongojojo]] || [[word:nadhongoshosho|nadhongoshosho]] || [[word:nadhongoko|nadhongoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:nadhongothon|nadhongothon]] || [[word:nadhongojon|nadhongojon]] || [[word:nadhongoshon|nadhongoshon]] || [[word:nadhongokon|nadhongokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:nadhongothoro|nadhongothoro]] || [[word:nadhongojoro|nadhongojoro]] || [[word:nadhongoshoro|nadhongoshoro]] || [[word:nadhongokoro|nadhongokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
